en.text: feminine singular participle of a comparative of G1909 and εἶμι (to go); supervening, i.e. (G2250 or G3571 being expressed or implied) the ensuing day or night

senses.gloss_en: feminine singular participle of a comparative of G1909 and εἶμι (to go); supervening, i.e. (G2250 or G3571 being expressed or implied) the ensuing day or night
